New Delhi.narrative_focus: Hyper-localization to build community pulse and generate long-term goodwill.

constraints.truth: To ensure maximum goodwill and freshness, 90% of raw vegetables (potatoes, peas) MUST be sourced from local Mandis (wholesale markets) in the NCR region.
While ingredients are local, the 'Secret Spice Blend' and 'Cooking Temperature Standards' are governed by CENTRAL HQ rules to ensure brand consistency.
To get a 'pulse' of the crowd, each shop must feature a 'Flavor of the Month' decided by local neighborhood voting.

strategic_priorities: Community-first growth through localized supply chains
Absolute quality governance via central standards
